title: Scale Container on Mittwald
description: Scale container resources on Mittwald hosting.
prompt: My website on Mittwald is getting more traffic and I need to check my container resources. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to list my projects and their containers.

My website is getting more traffic and I need to increase the resources. Can you help me scale up the container resources for better performance? Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
